    p=Path(p)

    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}

    p.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v10','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-844 runtime state missing; dispatch Claude dispatcher','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)

    p=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem844_real_response_retry.json')
    p.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v10','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-844 real response missing; retry Claude dispatcher','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)

Path('governance/reports/bem844_execute_after_bem843.md').write_text('# BEM-844 | Execute After BEM-843 | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)

Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-844'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)

changed=['governance/state/bem844_execute_after_bem843.json','governance/reports/bem844_execute_after_bem843.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem844_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']+created_files
